case_title: SPEEDWAY DELIVERY & MESSENGER SERVICE VS HEWLETT, JAMES SR.

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SPEEDWAY DELIVERY & MESSENGER SERVICE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HEWLETT, JAMES SR. $893.38 PRINCIPAL, $60.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $953.38, DEFENDANT MAY SATISFY THE PRINCIPAL AMOUNT OF THE JUDGMENT BY ENDORSING TO PLAINTIFF'S A (VALID, CURRENTLY NEGOTIABLE) SETTLEMENT CHECK FROM UNITED SERVICES AUTOMOBILE ASSOCIATION IN THE AMOUNT OF $893.38. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT SPEEDWAY DELIVERY & MESSENGER SERVICE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
